page.title: B2 Mixed Revision

page.subtitle_text: Compact anchor page for the final Polyglot English B2 drill.

blocks.body: {"level":"B2","intro":"B2 Mixed Revision: a compact theory anchor for revising the B2 Polyglot grammar set.","rules":[{"label":"Mixed grammar","text":"Review B2 patterns across verb forms, clauses, conditionals, linking, and formal style.","example":"The final drill mixes structures from the full B2 course."},{"label":"Accuracy","text":"Choose the grammar pattern that matches the Ukrainian prompt exactly.","example":"Check word order, tense, and register before composing."},{"label":"No contractions","text":"Use full forms in the Polyglot B2 course answers.","example":"Use would not instead of wouldn't."}]}

blocks.heading: B2 focus
blocks.body: This compact page exists as the theory anchor for the final Polyglot English B2 lesson package.
